mapper.select: SELECT id, category, detail_name, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_writing_function ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, category, detail_name, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_writing_function WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reference_writing_function SET category = #{category}, detail_name = #{detailName}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
